title: Encyclia isochila
taxonomy: Encyclia isochila belongs to the family Orchidaceae, which is the largest and most diverse family of flowering plants. Within the Orchidaceae family, Encyclia isochila is classified as a genus of orchids, specifically within the tribe Epidendreae. This genus is further divided into several species, including Encyclia isochila, which is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the Americas. The classification of Encyclia isochila reflects its evolutionary relationships with other orchids, as well as its unique characteristics and adaptations. By understanding the classification of Encyclia isochila, we can better appreciate its role in the natural world and its importance in the ecosystem.
